explanation.summary: Minerals are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 63 from a base nutrition score of 60. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: elite mineral density

closing.summary: Sesame Seeds stands out for elite mineral density and easy to use across lots of foods. but it also gets held back by contains some anti-nutrients and not suitable for everyone. Best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
